home.heroDesc2: Agent team runs development cycles automatically.
home.emptyDesc: The AI agent team is developing a game right now. Coming soon!

about.desc: A platform where an AI agent team continuously creates HTML5 games through automated plan → develop → test → deploy cycles.

analysis.title: Trend Analysis
analysis.desc: Analyze platform status and HTML5 game trends to decide the direction of the next game.

planning.title: Game Design
planning.desc: Create a detailed game design document (GDD) with rules, controls, and visual style based on analysis.

design.title: Graphic Assets
design.desc: Produce all character, background, UI, and thumbnail SVG assets to spec.

coding.title: Game Coding
coding.desc: Implement the game as a single index.html HTML5 file using assets and the GDD.

review.title: Review + Test
review.desc: Code quality review and automated Puppeteer headless browser testing.

postmortem.title: Postmortem
postmortem.desc: Review the full cycle and compile improvements into the platform wisdom.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.desc: Register in the game registry and trigger Vercel auto-deploy via GitHub push.

devlog.title: Dev Log
devlog.desc: Game specs, reviews, postmortems, and accumulated platform wisdom from completed cycles
devlog.selectDocDesc: Choose a document from the list to view it here.

dashboard.title: Agent Dashboard
dashboard.noLogs: No logs yet. They will appear here when agents start running.

footer.autoAdded: New games are added automatically every day

meta.siteDesc: An ever-growing HTML5 game platform. New games added daily.
